title: [Grinding Gears, Interior Clock]
description: Walls of old, dilapidated planks of sun-bleached wood are held haphazardly together by crooked nails and strands of copper wire.  A persistent ticking echoes throughout the space, as overhead a chaotic assortment of gears, cogs, and springs appear to support a large brass pendulum that sways slowly, in perfect rhythm.  Spanning the back wall is a lacquered countertop covered in a cluttered pile of odd instruments, bottles, and wares around a glass display case.
